note: Amenities are NOT badges. A badge is who you are on the network — the six M-Verified seals (js/entities.js), all wearing the M mark because they mean verification. An amenity is what a space or provider OFFERS — lighting, a booth, a green room. Each amenity carries its own line-emblem, never the M seal, and is described as an amenity, never a badge.

attest.seen: Seen — McCluster stood in the room

amenities.name: Full Rig On-Site
amenities.meaning: Strobes, modifiers, and stands live at the space — included or rentable at the door. You book the room; the loadout is already hung.

amenities.name: Cyc Wall
amenities.meaning: A true cyclorama — seamless, repaired, repainted on a schedule. Not a bedsheet and a prayer.

amenities.name: Natural Light
amenities.meaning: Documented window direction, best hours, and blackout options — plan the shoot before you arrive.

amenities.name: Client Lounge
amenities.meaning: A dedicated client area — seating, WiFi, coffee or water — separate from the working set.

amenities.name: Gear Locker
amenities.meaning: Lockable storage for client gear during multi-day bookings — cameras stay, nerves rest.

amenities.name: Same-Day Ready
amenities.meaning: Same-day windows stay open and the operator answers inside an hour during business hours.

amenities.name: Engineer On Call
amenities.short: A real engineer comes with the room
amenities.meaning: A working engineer is bookable with the session — credits on file, rates published. You rent a take, not silence.

amenities.name: Tuned Room
amenities.meaning: Control and live rooms are treated and documented — engineering, not egg cartons.

amenities.name: Iso Booth
amenities.meaning: A dedicated isolation booth with a documented noise floor — clean vocals even when the block outside isn't.

amenities.name: Mic Locker
amenities.meaning: A published mic inventory comes with the room — what's in the locker is what's on the listing.

amenities.name: Console Verified
amenities.short: The desk is real and it works
amenities.meaning: The console and outboard chain physically exist, power on, and pass signal — confirmed at review.

amenities.name: Mix & Master
amenities.short: Walk out with a finished record
amenities.meaning: In-house mixing and mastering with published turnaround — track it, mix it, master it, one roof.

amenities.name: Session Ready
amenities.meaning: The room is patched, templated, and tested before you arrive — the session starts when you do.

amenities.name: Broadcast Ready
amenities.short: This room can go to air
amenities.meaning: Power, connectivity, and acoustics rated for live broadcast — a show can uplink from this floor tonight.

amenities.name: Multicam
amenities.short: Built for more than one angle
amenities.meaning: Camera positions, sightlines, and cable runs support a multi-camera shoot without rebuilding the room.

amenities.name: Stream Uplink
amenities.meaning: Documented dedicated upload and a wired path to the world — the stream doesn't drop when the audience's phones arrive.

amenities.name: House Audio
amenities.short: A PA that tells the truth
amenities.meaning: The installed system is documented and maintained — coverage, console, and mics listed so your engineer knows the room before load-in.

amenities.name: Lighting Grid
amenities.meaning: A rated overhead grid or truss with house positions — the stage looks like a stage, not a conference-room afterthought.

amenities.name: Green Room
amenities.meaning: A private, secured green room — mirror, power, private access to the stage.

amenities.name: Capacity Rated
amenities.meaning: A current fire-marshal occupancy certificate on file, with seated and standing configurations published.

amenities.name: House Screen
amenities.meaning: A large smart display lives in the room — slides, visuals, menus, or the game go up without renting AV.

amenities.name: Furnished
amenities.meaning: The room comes set: tables and chairs are part of the rental, so the budget goes to the moment, not the rental truck.
